steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank begins the final sentence, which describes a consequence of the plurality rule just defined: because the winner only needs the most votes (not a majority), a candidate can win with under 50%. The transition must signal that this outcome follows logically from the rule.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "However,": Signals contrast or contradiction. The final sentence doesn't contradict the plurality rule — it illustrates what it produces. ✗
  • "Moreover,": Signals addition of a separate point. The final sentence isn't adding new information; it's showing the direct result of plurality voting. ✗
  • "Similarly,": Signals analogy or parallel. The final sentence is a consequence, not a comparison. ✗
  • "Accordingly,": Signals logical consequence — "given what was just said, this follows." The under-50% scenario follows directly from the plurality definition. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
